text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Mejiro Bright's all-important debut
race has come. And while most racers would
arrive at the track with time to spare...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Good morning to you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's appearance is as unhurried as
ever. And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, this is Maki. Given that today is such an
important race, I thought it best to bring her
along to watch over me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My other little one, Kyu, is back at home. I
expect she's probably napping at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as our leisurely chat continues, race time
draws closer and closer. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone. Let's all have a terrific race
today.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huhhh?! You brought a doll into the paddock...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing? What event do you think
this is?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, it's the day of our ever-so-joyous debut.
And as such...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I thought I might approach it calmly. Now, let's all
of us have a leisurely time today, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... Good point... When she puts it like that,
it's kinda hard to argue...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I guess we were all pretty on edge, huh? Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, look! All the fire in the runners' faces is
dying down...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, what the heck are they talking about?
Their expressions are getting all soft and
relaxed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Bright's relaxed vibe is
infectious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, after a short waiting period...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee. Ah, the joyous race is just about to begin. And seeing as it is a race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm staying perfectly calm... Niiice and calm... I
shall race at my own pace, as always...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's talking to her doll as if she's trying to
soothe it, but her voice... It's very slightly
trembling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't Mejiro Bright fooling around—this is her
trying to stay as calm as possible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list: No, it's fine. But be sure to take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...I shall. Thank you very much. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if relieved, the young Mejiro lady smiles
warmly.
